Title: Duplicate About key in en.json — raw i18n keys on English About page
Steps: 1. Open /en/about in browser; 2. Observe hero section text
FixRecommendation: Merge two duplicate 'About' objects in src/messages/en.json into a single block containing all keys

Title: Booking API returns 401 for authenticated users
Steps: 1. Login with valid credentials; 2. Navigate to program detail; 3. Click 'Book Now' button
Expected: Booking created and redirect to checkout
FixRecommendation: Debug cookie flow: check payload-token cookie Domain/SameSite/Path attributes match API origin; verify NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL config

Title: Test popup with fake data on Terms page
Expected: Terms page loads cleanly, no popup
Actual: Popup with test data (asd, f2dsa, dcas) appears over content
FixRecommendation: Delete or set to draft the test popup in Payload Admin → Popups

Title: Test program 'sad' visible in program listing
Actual: Test program 'sad' appears with no instructor, no description
FixRecommendation: Delete or set to draft in Payload Admin → Programs

Title: Registration page field labels crowded on mobile viewport
Steps: 1. Open /en/register on mobile viewport (<400px); 2. Check field spacing
Actual: Labels slightly overlap on narrow screens
FixRecommendation: Add responsive padding/margin to registration form fields in CSS module

Title: CRM domain down — 503 + self-signed TLS certificate
FixRecommendation: 1. Issue valid cert via Let's Encrypt in Coolify/Traefik; 2. Verify Twenty CRM container health; 3. Check router config

Title: Cookie SameSite/Domain config suspected mismatch
Steps: 1. Login; 2. Inspect cookies in DevTools; 3. Attempt API call to /api/bookings/create
Expected: payload-token cookie sent with API requests
Actual: Cookie may not be sent due to SameSite=Strict or Domain mismatch
FixRecommendation: Audit Set-Cookie headers on login response; ensure SameSite=Lax, Domain matches, Path=/

Title: No CSRF protection on state-changing POST endpoints
Steps: 1. Check request headers for CSRF token; 2. Attempt POST without Origin header
Expected: Request rejected without valid CSRF token
Actual: Request processed (or returns 401 for other reasons) without CSRF check
FixRecommendation: Implement CSRF token validation on all state-changing POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints

Title: API error responses may leak internal details
Steps: 1. Trigger error on API endpoint; 2. Check response body for stack traces
Actual: Error responses may include internal paths, stack traces, or Payload internals
FixRecommendation: Add error sanitization middleware that strips stack traces and internal details in production

Title: No rate limiting on authentication endpoints
Steps: 1. Send rapid successive requests to login endpoint; 2. Check if rate limited
Expected: Rate limited after N failed attempts
FixRecommendation: Implement rate limiting (e.g. express-rate-limit or Nginx limit_req) on /api/users/login and /forgot-password

Title: Missing Cache-Control headers on public API responses
Steps: 1. curl -I public API endpoint; 2. Check Cache-Control header
Expected: Cache-Control with appropriate max-age for public data
FixRecommendation: Add Cache-Control: public, max-age=300 to public listing endpoints
